calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-12-2010 Off Calendar

APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER
Off Calendar Dec-14-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: Alisha M. Louie/Ryan J. Meckfessel, Atty. for Plaintiff and moving party: Wattle Creek Winery; Sarah Peterman, Atty. for Defendant and opposing party: Cameron Hughes Wine.
RULING: HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED:Plaintiff Wattle Creek Winery's Application For Writ Of Attachment is granted in the amount of $95,580. The undertaking is set in the amount of $10,000.
As to Defendant's objections, the court makes the following rulings:
As to the Brian Menconi declaration, the objections are overruled.
As to the Michael Launer declaration, the objections are overruled as to Paragraphs 5-7, except as the hearsay objection is sustained as to P. 2, lines 21-26.
As to the Michael Scholz declaration, the objections are overruled as to Paragraphs 3-6. The objections to Paragraph 6 are overruled as it is not offered for the truth of the matters contained therein.
The objections to 7, 8, 10, 11, 12, and 13 are overruled, except as the exhibits are not accepted as late served.
As to Plaintiff's objections, the court makes the following rulings:
As to Cameron Hughes' declaration, objections 1 and are overruled. Objections 3, 4-7 are sustained.
As to the declaration of Samuel Spencer, objections 1, 2 are sustained. Objections 3, 4, 5, 6, 7 are overruled. Objections to Paragraph 18, 19, 20, 21 are overruled.
Objections to Paragraph 22 and 23 are sustained. Objections Paragraph 25 are overruled. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
